tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Date: Sun, 28 Mar 2010
From: Darkvette
Subject: More CORRECTED chords for 'Nothing Compares 2 U' by Sinead O'Connor

                       NOTHING COMPARES 2U
                         Sinead O'Connor

Ok, so while this guy’s version was correct, there are some chords missing.  Each 
Verse is a little different in the way it's laid out.  Enjoy.


Chords:
[ch]F[/ch]  (133211)   
[ch]C[/ch]  (x32010)    
[ch]Dm[/ch] (xx0231)
[ch]Eb[/ch] (xxx343) or (x6888x)
[ch]Bb[/ch] (x1333x) or (688766)


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
It's been seven hours and fifteen days[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
since you took your love away[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
I go out every night and sleep all day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
since you took your love away[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                 [ch]C[/ch]
Since you been gone I can do what-ever I want[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
I can see whomever I choose[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
I can eat my dinner in a fancy restaurant[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]                                [ch]A[/ch]
but nothing, I said nothing can take away these blues[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
'cos nothing compares[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
nothing compares 2 U.[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
It's been so lonely without U here[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
like a bird without a song[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
nothing can stop these lonely tears from falling[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]
tell me baby where did I go wrong?[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
I could put my arms around every boy I see[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
but they only remind me of U.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                     [ch]C[/ch]
I went to the doctor and guess what he told me guess what he told me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                              [ch]A[/ch]
he said: "girl U better try to have fun no matter what U do"[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
but he's a fool[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
'cos nothing compares[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
nothing compares 2U.[/tab]

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]


[Outro]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                     
All the flowers that U planted mama[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
in the back yard[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
all died when U went away[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                  [ch]C[/ch] 
I know that living with U baby was sometimes hard[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]A[/ch]
but I'm willing 2 give U another try[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
nothing compares[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
nothing compares 2U.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
nothing compares[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
nothing compares 2U.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
nothing compares[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
nothing compares 2U.[/tab]
